feed.title: SAP Community - SAP Business One
feed.subtitle: SAP Business One Q&A in SAP Community

entry.title: Payment Wizard schedule
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

How do I get the scheduled payment run to work in Payment Wizard?

I tried scheduling a payment run on a specific date and time, but it didn't execute/

Thank you.

entry.title: Business One Gateway API 404 Not Found Error
entry.content:
Hi,

I am trying to use the Business One Gateway API to retrieve a list of reports that I can then download as a PDF.

The login request works and I get the following response:
{"Version":"0.0.1","SessionTimeout":30}
I am not passing in the optional DBInstance parameter if that makes any difference?

To confirm the login was working, if I change the username/password etc, I get the following response:

{ "code": -1, "message": { "lang": "en-us", "value": "Failed to login for current user, please double check and retry" }}
 
Once logged in successfully, any subsequent GET requests to the API gateway like  '/rs/v1/LoadAuthorizedCRList' just returns the following:

{"code":404,"message": "404 NOT_FOUND"}

If I try and call '/logout' I get the following:

{ "timestamp": "2025-02-05T04:41:25.127+00:00", "status": 400, "error": "Bad Request", "path": "/auth/oidc.logout" }

 

I am using SAP Business One 10.0 (10.00.240) SP 2402 (64-bit) and I have confirmed the Job Server is setup. I am also in a Cloud Control Centre environment.

Any help would be appreciated.

entry.title: Posting Delivery via DTW
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

May I ask if you have encounter this error during uploading of Delivery via DTW. my DTW file is posted below.

" Created Failed You should use existing serial/batch numbers for this document type [Message 29-51] "

 

 

 

 

TYIA

entry.title: Upgrade SAP B1 Client v9.2 PL03 to v9.3 PL14 error
entry.content:
Upgrade SAP B1 Client v9.2 PL03 to v9.3 PL14 error. 

If there is a solution please support me, thanks a lot!

entry.title: SAP Business One - RSP Backup Failed Due to HANA Folder Permission Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP TechUsers,

I'm facing an issue in SAP Business One where the RSP backup fails due to HANA folder permission issues. Within 2-3 days, the folder permissions need to be restored using chmod 777. After resetting the folder permissions, the backup works properly. However, I need to set the permissions to 777 daily.

Could anyone help me identify the cause of this issue? Additionally, could you provide guidance on how to set the permissions in the daily crontab?

Thank you in advance for your assistance.

entry.title: Direct Network Path Backup in SAP Business One HANA DB Server
entry.content:
Dear SAP Tech Users,

I have a question regarding SAP Business One HANA DB Server backup. Is it possible to configure a direct network path backup in RSP Backup, such as \\127.0.0.1\Backup Path? If not, is there any other SAP inbuilt utility that can solve this problem and allow the backup to go directly to a network-located NAS drive?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: SAP HANA DB Server Installation on SUSE Linux
entry.content:
Dear SAP Tech Users,

I need to know that, while installing SAP HANA DB SERVER on SUSE Linux, does it install both the application and database server on a single server, or does it only install the database server and the application server remains on a Windows server? Additionally, what web server services does it use on SUSE Linux or any other Linux platform? Does it use Apache, Nginx, or a self-built web server, and where is it located? What is the web service or web server name?

Thank you for your assistance.

entry.title: Adding new properties for Business Partner Group
entry.content:
Hello Community,

I want to add a new property for my existing business partner group, what should I do for this?

entry.title: Add Button in Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi

  I have below code . I want to add button in Sales Order Form after Cancell Button

SAPbobsCOM.Company oCompany = new SAPbobsCOM.Company();
SAPbouiCOM.Application oApplication = new SAPbouiCOM.Application();

oCompany.Server = "10.0.1.28:30015";
oCompany.DbServerType = BoDataServerTypes.dst_HANADB;
oCompany.CompanyDB = "Test_LIVE";
oCompany.UserName = "manager";
oCompany.Password = "123";
oCompany.language = BoSuppLangs.ln_English;
oCompany.UseTrusted = true;

int connectionResult = oCompany.Connect();
if (connectionResult != 0)
{
throw new Exception("Error connecting to SAP Business One: " + oCompany.GetLastErrorDescription());
}

Thanks

entry.title: The detail on alerts disapears after opening the documents on the detail
entry.content:
Hi, 
I found a problem with SAP B1 10 HANA and SQL versions.

I have an alert when new production orders are created. The alert is based on a query, and on the details is the the list of the new orders.

If I use the drill-down arrow and open and close multiple (+10) documents, from the list, and then I move to the next alert, all the details with the document list disappear. from all the alerts !

The query returns around 20/30 documents with just the number, date, project and status.

The alert

After the problem occurs

I have to close SAP B1 to get the alert details back.

Anyone with a similar issue ?
And better with a solution ?


Thanks,
Paulo

entry.title: SAP B1 Message 173-17 || Meldung 173-17
entry.content:
Situation:

For testing purposes I wanted to make a manual journal entry to accounts with different currencies.

Expected result:

After checking that the account balance (debit and credit across all accounts) holds true in the default currency, I expect the system to book the journal entry.

Alternatively I expect the system to suggest other accounts on which to book a losses due to currency exchange rate.

Result:

I get the message error 173-17

I don't understand the message. Was just playing around with the functionality as I'm preparing for the Consultant exam.

entry.title: SAP Machine Binary Machine and Similar Processes Maxing out Server Resources
entry.content:
Issue Description:

We are experiencing performance issues with our SAP Business One environment, specifically related to the SAP Machine Binary Machine process and other processes as shown in the screenshot image below. They collectively appear to be consuming excessive system resources, including CPU and RAM which is affecting overall server performance.

System Details:

  • SAP Business One Version: SAP B1 10.0 FP2405
  • Database: SQL Server
  • Server Specifications: CPU: 2.3 GHz(6 Processors), RAM = 16GB
  • Operating System: Windows Server 2019 Standard Evaluation
  • SAP Components Installed: SAP B1, Service Layer, B1 Web Client

Observed Behavior:

  • The SAP Machine Binary Machine process and other similar processes are collectively consuming high CPU and RAM usage, sometimes reaching close to 100% utilization.
  • Server performance degrades significantly, causing delays in overall operations, transaction processing, timeouts, and slow report generation.
  • Restarting the SAP services or server temporarily resolves the issue, but it returns after a while.

Troubleshooting Steps Taken:

  • Checked Windows Task Manager to identify resource utilization.
  • Monitored database activity to check for long-running queries or high load.
  • Disabled unnecessary services or background tasks related to SAP.
  • Increased server memory allocation, but the issue persists.
  • Upgraded SAP B1 to higher versions.

Any insights or recommendations would be greatly appreciated.

entry.title: note 3304656 : E:TN:872 SAPK61700QCPSAPAPPL
entry.content:
Hello SAP Community,

When i trying to implement the SNOTE 3304656 a message error occured : E:TN:872 SAPK61700QCPSAPAPPL , the current version of SAP_APPL version: 617-SP LEVEL: 0008 and ECC-DIMP version 600 - SP LEVEL: 0026.

Thanks for help in advance

best regards.

entry.title: Item name not updated in BOM lines
entry.content:
Lately one of my customers updated the item name in "Item Master Data" of many items used in many BoMs as component items, but those items name didn't change in the BoM as well. 

Attached is an example.

So is there any solution to refresh those BoMs, if not what is the best workaround.

entry.title: Central Deployment SAP B1 v9.3 PL14 error: Refresh the component lists on selected machines.
entry.content:
Dear All,

When I install sap b1 client and diapi from Central deployment it shows error: Refresh the component lists on selected machines., if anyone has solution, please support me. Thanks a lot!

entry.title: Customer Ship To Address ID
entry.content:
Hi All

It is System Limitation Maximum Ship To Address ID in Business Partner Master Data is 50 Characters only.  It is not possible to increase this Address ID to more than 50 characters?  As it is too short for some Company Names.

 

 

Kedalene Chong

entry.title: B1IF Scenario to create PDF file and use it in next step ?
entry.content:
Hi Experts ,

I have created a scenario to send PDF doc to API call .so first i create a pdf file using Crystal report atom then i convert the PDF to Base 64 using .net call .Here the problem what am facing is .net atom triggers before the file generated so the error is file not found .But i can see the file after the scenario end . also i tried delay login in .net but file saved only  after all process done .is thr any way to save the file in middle step .

Regards

jaba

entry.title: Add user who last updated order
entry.content:
Hi,

I want to create a summary query of a collection of sales orders.

This data comes from the ORDR or RDR1 table.

I want to add which user last updated the sales order.

Can this be added?

entry.title: Peppol provider confguration in SAP Business One
entry.content:
I am trying to understand the meaning of the various parameter settings in the "Processing Targets for Protocol" option of the "Peppol Configuration Section" of "Electronic Documents" in SAP Business One, see capture in attached.

My Peppol provider Bill-it has assigned an API key to my account that can be used for interfacing, but I don't know if that technique is supported by B1iWS and how and what needs to be entered where to make this work.

Does anyone have experience with similar providers, and if so, what info needs to be entered to get this to work?

Thanks

entry.title: Customizing Subject Line for Success/Failure RSP Backup Emails
entry.content:
Dear SAP Tech Users,

We have scheduled RSP backups on local storage and configured the RSP mail system. I need to modify the subject line of the RSP emails. Is it possible to customize the subject line, or does it remain the same as the standard subject line provided by SAP?

SAP Tech Users, please help me with the steps to modify the RSP mail subject line.
